name: Buttermilk Slaw
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, whisk together the sour cream, buttermilk, vinegar, Worcestershire sauce, hot sauce, sugar, celery seed, salt, and pepper.
2. Remove the tough outer leaves from the cabbage and discard. Quarter the cabbage; cut out the core. Using a mandoline or a thin sharp knife, slice the cabbage lengthwise into 1/4-inch wide shreds.
3. In a large bowl, toss the cabbage with the red onion, parsley, and the dressing. Refrigerate for up to 1 hour before serving. Add the basil at the last minute if desired.
